ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "declarations" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the module declares dependencies */,
  "providers" TEXT /* Information about providers (e.g., services, guards) */,
  "exports" TEXT /* List of components or modules exported by this module */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that imports another */,
  "imported_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that is being imported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the import was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_imported_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that provides services */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., service, guard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module exporting the component */,
  "exported_component" TEXT /* Name of the exported component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exported component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent module */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., import, dependency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_relationships_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_relationships_dependent_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_versions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_rights" (
  "right_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access right record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, deploy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("right_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_rights_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_rights_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
